title: Rich Japanese Blueberries Stir-fry
description: A rich and fluffy Japanese dish featuring blueberries that is perfect for post-workout snacks, whole30-friendly and suitable for air frying.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup almond flour
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with oat flour for gluten-free option

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the blueberries, maple syrup, almond flour, salt, and black pepper.
Stir until the mixture is evenly coated with all ingredients. Ensure no clumps remain.
Pour the mixture into your air fryer basket.
Air fry for 10 minutes or until golden brown, stirring halfway through cooking time to ensure even heat distribution.
Remove from air fryer and let rest for a minute before serving.
